title: IN PERSON TAX ASSISTANCE - 211info
text: MFS CASH OREGON IN PERSON TAX ASSISTANCE Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides an online locator for in-person appointments for federal and Oregon tax preparation. IRS-certified volunteers prepare most individual tax returns and limited self-employment returns. Includes help with applying for or renewing an Individual Taxpayer Identification Number (ITIN) and information about available tax credits. Accepts volunteers for client facilitators, interpreters, outreach committee members, and tax preparers. 919 NE 19th Avenue Suite 200 Portland, OR 97232 Eligibility: Household income at or below $69,000 None of the following: Rental property, sale of cryptocurrency, or adjustments on education expenses (box 4 or 6 on 1098-T) Self employment income with any of the following: Over $50,000 in expenses, a loss for the year, employees, business use of the home, depreciation or amortization Hours: Appointments for the 2026 tax season will open at noon on Thursday, January 15, 2026 Email Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Visit website to make an appointment or for more information. Visit website or email for volunteer opportunities. FEES: None DOCUMENTS: See website for required documents LANGUAGES: English, Spanish, Cantonese, Mandarin, Russian, Vietnamese AREA SERVED: Clackamas, Multnomah, and Washington Counties Services: Earned Income Credit Information Individual Taxpayer Identification Numbers Tax Preparation Assistance Volunteer Opportunities Other Services Offered At This Location: TAX ORGANIZATIONS AND SERVICES - DO-IT-YOURSELF TAX PREP TAX ORGANIZATIONS AND SERVICES - VIRTUAL TAX ASSISTANCE If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. MFS CASH OREGON
